case_title: JIN LI VS. AJARAY MCCANN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 68444461) FILED BY DEFENDANT PIIKUP LLC MCCANN, AJARAY DOMINEKK
